content: Our paper "Transfer Learning for Spatial Autoregressive Models with Application to U.S. Presidential Election Prediction" has been accepted to Journal of Business & Economic Statistics!
Our paper "Robust Online Conformal Prediction under Uniform Label Noise" has been accepted to NeurIPS 2025!
Our paper "Parametric Scaling Law of Tuning Bias in Conformal Prediction" has been accepted to ICML 2025!
Started postdoctoral position at the Department of Statistics and Data Science, SUSTech under the SUSTech-NUS Joint Research Program.
Graduated with a Ph.D. in Statistics from Gregory and Paula Chow Institute for Studies in Economics, Xiamen University.
